fact_nuggets.text: Shell Armor (Japanese: Shell Armor) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Blocks critical hits. MD T D S Blocks critical hits on the Pokemon. B S L Conq. The Pokemon is protected against critical hits. MD GtI Moves will not make a critical hit. * Moves don't hit critically! Never ever! * S MD Moves don't hit the Pokemon critically! Never ever! MD RT DX Moves are never critical hits against this Pokemon.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor prevents the Pokemon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokemon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor prevents the Pokemon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokemon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus .
